name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no pressure, no guilt. We just wanted to make sure the door stays open.

If and when you're ready for another painless cleaning or a quick check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Just mention it (or use it at checkout) the next time you book.

And honestly — if something about your last visit didn't sit right, we'd really like to know. Hit reply and it comes straight to the team. We read every one.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly nudge that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready. No pressure!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
